June 27, 2005
the day Khadija decided to bless this world with her existence ✦

It's her day! 🎂 Happy 20th birthday Khadija ✦

a note from momna

To my Roomiein the hostel💕

You know I'm not the most expressive person, so writing this already feels a little out of character for me. But today is your birthday, and I wanted to tell you a few things that I don't say often enough.

One of the things I admire most about you is your kindness. You have such a soft heart, and you care about people more deeply than most realize. You put genuine effort into the people you love and care about, and that's something rare these days.

If I'm being honest, you've probably put more effort into our friendship than I have. You've been patient with me, checked on me, listened to me, and stayed around even when I wasn't the easiest person to deal with. And I don't think I've ever properly thanked you for that.

The truth is, I've always been someone who takes a long time to trust people. I keep a lot of things to myself, I don't share my personal struggles easily, I overthink more than I should, and sometimes I create distance without meaning to. I know that can make friendships difficult.

And then there's my stubborn side. 😭

I'm sure there have been moments when I annoyed you, argued unnecessarily, or acted like I already knew everything. If I ever hurt your feelings or made things harder because of my behavior, I'm sorry. 😭😭

What means a lot to me is that despite all of that, you've remained the same person — kind, caring, understanding, and supportive.

We still have two years of university left together. Two more years of assignments, presentations, deadlines, stress, random conversations, inside jokes, and memories we haven't made yet. And honestly, I'm looking forward to that.

I know life hasn't always been easy, and I know you're someone who feels things deeply. But that's one of the things that makes you special. Your kindness isn't weakness. Your ability to care isn't weakness. It's a strength that makes people feel safe around you.

Thank you for every effort you've put into our friendship. Thank you for your patience, your support, and for being there even when I wasn't always easy to understand.

I may not say these things often, but today I wanted you to know them.

I hope this year brings you happiness, success, peace, and everything you're working so hard for.

Happy Birthday, Khadija. And thank you for being such an important part of my university journey.

with love, Momna 🌸

twenty years of her

A little timeline

27 June 2005
She arrived ✨
A Saturday in June. The world quietly got a little softer and didn't even realise why.
2010 — 2015
The chaotic era
Her most unhinged, most joyful, most iconic years. We love every single bit of it.
2023
She survived exams
Late nights, stress she now laughs about, results she earned beautifully. So proud.
2024
We met at the hostel 🏠
She walked in and that was that. Best thing about 2024, genuinely.
27 June 2026
Twenty-one. Iconic. Hers. ✦
A whole new chapter. More laughter, bigger dreams, so much good ahead. Can't wait to watch.

little gifts from momna

Tap each one open ✦

each card is hiding something just for you

🌸
a thing I love about you
tap to open
Your kindness.Not the loud kind that everyone notices, but the quiet kind. The way you care about people, remember little things, put effort into friendships, and make others feel valued. You have a soft heart, and I hope life never takes that away from you. ✦
🎂
a birthday truth
tap to open
You have probably put more effort into our friendship than I have.I've never been great at expressing myself. I take a long time to trust people, I keep many things to myself, and sometimes I create distance without meaning to. But despite all of that, you've remained patient and understanding, and I appreciate that more than I say. 🌸
🌷
a hostel memory
tap to open
One of my favorite things about hostel life is knowing that no matter how stressful university gets, there is always someone I can sit with, talk to, laugh with, or simply exist around without feeling judged.Some of my favorite memories aren't even special events—they're just ordinary hostel moments that became special because you were there ✦
✨
something you should know
tap to open
There's something I've never been very good at, and that's sharing my personal problems.Sometimes when I'm dealing with something, I become distant, quiet, or lost in my own thoughts. I tend to handle things on my own, and instead of talking about what's bothering me, I just disappear for a while or act differently. I know that can sometimes create misunderstandings or even unnecessary arguments. So if that ever happens, I want you to know that it's usually not because of you. Most of the time, I'm just dealing with my own thoughts, overthinking things, or following my bad habit of keeping everything to myself. I'm still working on that.🌷
🎀
my birthday wish for you
tap to open
I hope this year brings you peace. Not just happiness for a moment, but real peace. The kind that lets you sleep without worries, smile without forcing it, and move through life knowing your efforts are worth something.🌸
💌
a promise
tap to open
I don't make a lot of promises, so here's a simple one. No matter how busy university gets, how many assignments we have, or where life takes us over the next two years, if you ever genuinely need me, I'll do my best to be there. Maybe not with perfect advice, and definitely not with long emotional speeches 😭, but with whatever help, support, or company I can give.And I promise to put a little more effort into our friendship, because you've always deserved that. ✦

from everyone who loves her
